task_description:
# Multimodal Scan Feedback System

Provide immediate, multimodal confirmation on every barcode scan: audible beep (success/failure differentiated), haptic vibration pattern (short pulse for success, double-pulse for error), and visual flash/animation on the scan result area. Configurable volume and vibration intensity. Designed for noisy industrial environments where any single feedback channel may be missed.

## Rationale
Warehouse environments are loud — machinery, forklifts, conveyors. Workers can't always look at the screen (hands busy, items in the way) or hear a beep (hearing protection). Multimodal feedback ensures every scan is confirmed regardless of environmental conditions. No competitor provides this level of feedback design for industrial use.

## User Stories
- As a warehouse worker in a noisy environment, I want to feel a vibration when I scan so that I know the scan was captured even if I can't hear or see the screen
- As a warehouse worker, I want distinct success/error feedback so that I immediately know if I need to re-scan an item

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Successful scan triggers: audible beep + short vibration + green visual flash
- [ ] Failed/unrecognized scan triggers: error tone + double vibration + red visual flash
- [ ] Audio plays through device speaker at configurable volume
- [ ] Vibration pattern is distinct for success vs. error
- [ ] Visual feedback is visible at arm's length (not subtle animation)
- [ ] Feedback latency < 100ms from scan event
- [ ] Feedback works when screen is partially obscured or tilted
